overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a white spacesuit walking through a sci-fi industrial outpost at night. The character traverses stone walkways, passes under a flying spacecraft, and enters a tunnel leading to an interior area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone walkway with parapet walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone bridge toward the industrial outpost

entered.detail: tall stone wall running along the left side of the walkway
large multi-story industrial structure with illuminated windows and antennae on top
white sandbags piled along the left wall
large industrial pipes running along the right side of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated stone bridge with high parapet walls on both sides. Sandbags are piled on the left while industrial pipes run along the right. In the distance, a large industrial outpost building with illuminated windows is visible against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial bridge approach with chain-link fencing

events.description: spaceship with glowing thrusters flies overhead from left to right

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the outpost entrance while a spacecraft passes overhead

entered.detail: metal security fencing with poles along the right side
bright industrial floodlights on metal poles illuminating the area
security gate with vertical bars at the entrance to the facility

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the main gate of the industrial facility, passing chain-link fencing and bright floodlights on the right. A spaceship with glowing orange thrusters suddenly flies overhead. The outpost building looms larger ahead with its illuminated signage becoming more visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: checkpoint area with shipping containers and stone stairs

events.description: character turns right toward the checkpoint area with red containers
character descends stone stairs toward tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: turning toward the checkpoint, passing red containers and descending stairs toward a tunnel

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the red shipping containers

entered.detail: large red metal shipping containers stacked near the checkpoint
wide stone staircase leading down to a lower level
arched stone doorway leading into the building interior

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a checkpoint area marked by large red shipping containers. An NPC stands guard near the containers. The character passes through the checkpoint and descends a short flight of stone stairs, approaching a tunnel entrance built into the stone structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone tunnel with overhead lighting

events.description: entering the covered tunnel from the outdoor checkpoint area

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit tunnel toward the bright exit

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls of the covered passageway
industrial ceiling lights illuminating the tunnel path
brightly lit doorway at the far end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, covered tunnel with rough stone walls and overhead industrial lighting. The tunnel stretches ahead toward a brightly lit exit portal. The enclosed space contrasts with the open exterior, creating a transition from the outdoor outpost to an interior area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, elevated industrial walkway into the enclosed confines of a stone tunnel. It begins with the character traversing a stone bridge flanked by sandbags and pipes, moving toward a distant outpost building illuminated against the night sky. As the character approaches the facility's main gate, the scene opens up under bright floodlights just as a spaceship with glowing orange thrusters streaks overhead. The camera then shifts right into a checkpoint area marked by red shipping containers and a guard before descending a short flight of stairs. Finally, the environment transitions from the open air into a narrow, covered tunnel with rough stone walls and overhead lighting that leads toward a brightly lit exit portal.
